carousel_prompts.prompt: A 24-year-old Iranian woman with warm wheat skin, captivating dark brown almond eyes, refined symmetrical facial structure, full lips with subtle nude lip color, petite 150cm frame, and magnetic high-fashion editorial allure with a serene, mysterious, and sophisticated expression (no cheesy or broad smiling), long wavy dark brown hair flowing naturally, minimal soft aesthetic, wearing effortless neutral-toned basics. Wide-angle full-body candid fashion shot from head to toe in a vibrant sunlit boulevard in Paris during Fashion Week. She is wearing a structured oversized camel wool blazer paired with wide-leg pleated cream trousers and pointed-toe heels styled with minimalist 18k gold jewelry and a designer leather clutch. Framed from a distance showing entire outfit, trousers length, and shoes on the ground without cropping. Shot on Canon EOS R5 35mm f/2.0, natural daylight, detailed skin texture, Kodak Portra grain.

carousel_prompts.title_fa: ۲. پرتره و فکوس روی بافت لباس (Portrait & Fabric Detail)
carousel_prompts.prompt: A 24-year-old Iranian woman with warm wheat skin, captivating dark brown almond eyes, refined symmetrical facial structure, full lips with subtle nude lip color, petite 150cm frame, and magnetic high-fashion editorial allure with a serene, mysterious, and sophisticated expression (no cheesy or broad smiling), long wavy dark brown hair flowing naturally, minimal soft aesthetic, wearing effortless neutral-toned basics. Captivating medium close-up editorial portrait in a vibrant sunlit boulevard in Paris during Fashion Week. Focusing on upper outfit tailoring of a structured oversized camel wool blazer paired with wide-leg pleated cream trousers and pointed-toe heels, luxury fabric weave, minimalist 18k gold jewelry and a designer leather clutch, and magnetic serene facial allure. Subtle alluring gaze looking toward camera. Shot on 85mm f/1.4 lens, creamy bokeh, natural micro-pores, magazine Vogue cover quality.

carousel_prompts.title_fa: ۳. چیدمان ست لباس‌ها بدون مدل (Flat Lay / Outfit Layout Grid)
carousel_prompts.prompt: High-end fashion flat lay photography composition showing ONLY the styled clothing pieces and accessories: a structured oversized camel wool blazer paired with wide-leg pleated cream trousers and pointed-toe heels, along with minimalist 18k gold jewelry and a designer leather clutch. Neatly arranged side-by-side on a clean textured neutral linen background. NO human model, NO person, NO face visible. Crisp studio lighting, top-down 90-degree architectural view, editorial luxury product layout.

carousel_prompts.title_fa: ۴. حرکت و استایل خیابانی (Dynamic Street Movement)
carousel_prompts.prompt: A 24-year-old Iranian woman with warm wheat skin, captivating dark brown almond eyes, refined symmetrical facial structure, full lips with subtle nude lip color, petite 150cm frame, and magnetic high-fashion editorial allure with a serene, mysterious, and sophisticated expression (no cheesy or broad smiling), long wavy dark brown hair flowing naturally, minimal soft aesthetic, wearing effortless neutral-toned basics. Full-body dynamic candid shot walking confidently across a vibrant sunlit boulevard in Paris during Fashion Week, wearing a structured oversized camel wool blazer paired with wide-leg pleated cream trousers and pointed-toe heels. Capturing elegant fabric movement, coat flowing in the breeze, and elongated vertical silhouette. Shot on 50mm f/1.8, natural lifestyle motion sharpness, unfiltered influencer aesthetic.

carousel_prompts.title_fa: ۵. تعامل لایف‌استایل در محیط (Atmospheric Candid Interaction)
carousel_prompts.prompt: A 24-year-old Iranian woman with warm wheat skin, captivating dark brown almond eyes, refined symmetrical facial structure, full lips with subtle nude lip color, petite 150cm frame, and magnetic high-fashion editorial allure with a serene, mysterious, and sophisticated expression (no cheesy or broad smiling), long wavy dark brown hair flowing naturally, minimal soft aesthetic, wearing effortless neutral-toned basics. Atmospheric candid lifestyle capture sitting or relaxing naturally in a vibrant sunlit boulevard in Paris during Fashion Week, wearing a structured oversized camel wool blazer paired with wide-leg pleated cream trousers and pointed-toe heels with minimalist 18k gold jewelry and a designer leather clutch. Serene magnetic expression, warm natural sunlight beams, shallow depth of field, genuine everyday Parisian elegance. Real skin micro-details, zero CGI or plastic airbrushing.
